name: cst
author: Ovidiu Chis, Nicolae Matei, Daniel Dudas

scripts.copy-libs:macos: mkdir -p assets/external && cp node_modules/marked/lib/marked.umd.js assets/external/marked.min.js && cp node_modules/dompurify/dist/purify.min.js assets/external/dompurify.min.js
scripts.copy-libs:windows: mkdir assets\external && copy node_modules\marked\lib\marked.umd.js assets\external\marked.min.js && copy node_modules\dompurify\dist\purify.min.js assets\external\dompurify.min.js
